framework.name: Trust Ladder for Marketplace Evolution
framework.description: A six-stage progression for building trust in marketplaces as they scale: (1) Code of Conduct, (2) Declaration (identity disclosure), (3) Communication channels, (4) Social Dimension (network effects), (5) Verification (identity/capability proofs), (6) Reputation systems. Each stage corresponds to increasing platform size and transaction risk.
framework.raw_quote: the mechanism that is needed in the early days is different from the one needed when you achieve scale... moving from the early phases to trust at scale
